requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Mandatory S-Mark Certification (Resolucion 169/2018 + IRAM/IEC 60335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——强制S标志认证（第169/2018号决议 + IRAM/IEC 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——強制S標誌認證（第169/2018號決議 + IRAM/IEC 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances sold in Argentina must hold mandatory electrical-safety certification administered by the Secretaria de Comercio (Secretariat of Commerce) under the Regimen de Seguridad Electrica, currently consolidated in Resolucion 169/2018 (and successor/amending resolutions). Certified products carry the 'S' safety mark (Sello de Seguridad), issued by IRAM (Instituto Argentino de Normalizacion y Certificacion) or another recognized certifying body designated by the Ente Nacional Regulador de la Electricidad / Secretaria de Comercio. The applicable product-specific standard is IRAM 60335-2-24 (adopting IEC 60335-2-24, Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), read with the general standard IRAM/IEC 60335-1. Certification is a third-party scheme: type testing plus, depending on the certification model, ongoing factory surveillance or batch testing. The model is rated for 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase supply. A certificate (and the 'S' mark on the product) must be in place before customs clearance and sale; the importer holding the certificate is the responsible operator.
summary.zh: 在阿根廷销售的家用制冷器具须取得由商务秘书处（Secretaria de Comercio）依据《电气安全制度》（现整合于第169/2018号决议及其后续/修订决议）管理的强制电气安全认证。获证产品须加贴"S"安全标志（Sello de Seguridad），由IRAM（阿根廷标准化与认证协会）或商务秘书处/电力监管机构指定的其他认可认证机构颁发。适用的产品专项标准为IRAM 60335-2-24（采用IEC 60335-2-24，制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），须与通用标准IRAM/IEC 60335-1结合使用。该认证为第三方制度：型式试验加上视认证模式而定的持续工厂监督或批次检测。机型按220 V/50 Hz单相供电定额。证书（及产品上的"S"标志）须在清关和销售前到位；持证进口商为责任运营方。
summary.zht: 在阿根廷銷售的家用製冷器具須取得由商務秘書處（Secretaria de Comercio）依據《電氣安全制度》（現整合於第169/2018號決議及其後續/修訂決議）管理的強制電氣安全認證。獲證產品須加貼"S"安全標誌（Sello de Seguridad），由IRAM（阿根廷標準化與認證協會）或商務秘書處/電力監管機構指定的其他認可認證機構頒發。適用的產品專項標準為IRAM 60335-2-24（採用IEC 60335-2-24，製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），須與通用標準IRAM/IEC 60335-1結合使用。該認證為第三方制度：型式試驗加上視認證模式而定的持續工廠監督或批次檢測。機型按220 V/50 Hz單相供電定額。證書（及產品上的"S"標誌）須在清關和銷售前到位；持證進口商為責任運營方。

standards_or_laws: Resolucion 169/2018 (Secretaria de Comercio, Argentina) — Regimen de certificacion obligatoria de seguridad electrica; mandatory 'S' safety mark

IRAM/IEC 60335-2-24 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (IRAM adoption of IEC 60335-2-24)
IRAM/IEC 60335-1 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations, read with GB 4706.1 (general requirements). It is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated body before sale in China. Both Argentina's IRAM 60335-2-24 and China's GB 4706.13 share the IEC 60335-2-24 lineage, but CCC test reports issued by Chinese laboratories against GB 4706.13 are NOT accepted as equivalent evidence for Argentine S-mark certification — Argentina requires testing and certification through IRAM or another recognized Argentine certifier.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010并含中国国家偏差，须与GB 4706.1（通用要求）结合使用。该标准为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度监督执行；产品须经CNCA指定机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。阿根廷IRAM 60335-2-24与中国GB 4706.13同源于IEC 60335-2-24，但中国实验室依据GB 4706.13出具的CCC检测报告不被接受为阿根廷S标志认证的等效证据——阿根廷要求通过IRAM或其他认可的阿根廷认证机构进行检测和认证。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010並含中國國家偏差，須與GB 4706.1（通用要求）結合使用。該標準為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度監督執行；產品須經CNCA指定機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。阿根廷IRAM 60335-2-24與中國GB 4706.13同源於IEC 60335-2-24，但中國實驗室依據GB 4706.13出具的CCC檢測報告不被接受為阿根廷S標誌認證的等效證據——阿根廷要求通過IRAM或其他認可的阿根廷認證機構進行檢測和認證。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Although both regimes descend from IEC 60335-2-24, Argentina does not accept Chinese CCC certificates or CNAS test reports. Exporters must: (1) obtain IRAM 60335-2-24 testing through IRAM or another Argentine-recognized certifier (an IECEE CB Scheme report based on IEC 60335-2-24 may reduce re-testing scope where the certifier accepts it and all Argentine deviations are covered — verify case by case); (2) carry the 'S' safety mark on the product before importation; (3) ensure the certificate is held by an Argentine importer with a CUIT (the manufacturer cannot self-certify); (4) confirm the product is rated for 220 V / 50 Hz — Argentine single-phase nominal voltage (220 V) and frequency (50 Hz) broadly match Chinese single-phase supply, so plug/voltage redesign is usually minor, but the Argentine type-C/I plug and local instruction-language (Spanish) requirements still apply. National deviations in GB 4706.13 mean Chinese test data cannot be assumed to cover IRAM 60335-2-24 without engineering review.
gap.zh: 尽管两套制度均源自IEC 60335-2-24，阿根廷不接受中国CCC证书或CNAS检测报告。出口商须：（1）通过IRAM或其他阿根廷认可认证机构完成IRAM 60335-2-24检测（基于IEC 60335-2-24的IECEE CB体系报告在认证机构接受且涵盖所有阿根廷偏差时可缩减重新检测范围——须逐案核实）；（2）在进口前于产品上加贴"S"安全标志；（3）确保证书由持有CUIT的阿根廷进口商持有（制造商不能自我认证）；（4）确认产品按220 V/50 Hz定额——阿根廷单相标称电压（220 V）和频率（50 Hz）与中国单相供电大致吻合，故插头/电压改造通常较小，但阿根廷C/I型插头及本地说明书语言（西班牙语）要求仍适用。GB 4706.13的国家偏差意味着中国检测数据不能在未经工程评审的情况下默认涵盖IRAM 60335-2-24。
gap.zht: 儘管兩套制度均源自IEC 60335-2-24，阿根廷不接受中國CCC證書或CNAS檢測報告。出口商須：（1）通過IRAM或其他阿根廷認可認證機構完成IRAM 60335-2-24檢測（基於IEC 60335-2-24的IECEE CB體系報告在認證機構接受且涵蓋所有阿根廷偏差時可縮減重新檢測範圍——須逐案核實）；（2）在進口前於產品上加貼"S"安全標誌；（3）確保證書由持有CUIT的阿根廷進口商持有（製造商不能自我認證）；（4）確認產品按220 V/50 Hz定額——阿根廷單相標稱電壓（220 V）和頻率（50 Hz）與中國單相供電大致吻合，故插頭/電壓改造通常較小，但阿根廷C/I型插頭及本地說明書語言（西班牙語）要求仍適用。GB 4706.13的國家偏差意味著中國檢測數據不能在未經工程評審的情況下默認涵蓋IRAM 60335-2-24。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — 'S' safety mark certification required before customs clearance and sale under Resolucion 169/2018; IRAM/IEC 60335-2-24 is the applicable product-specific standard; third-party certification via IRAM or recognized certifier (no self-declaration route)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: Boletin Oficial de la Republica Argentina / Secretaria de Comercio

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mandatory 'S' safety-mark certification under Resolucion 169/2018, tested to IRAM/IEC 60335-2-24, is required for household refrigerators sold in Argentina. Chinese CCC certification to GB 4706.13 is not accepted; certification must be obtained through IRAM or another recognized Argentine certifier and held by an Argentine importer with a CUIT. An IECEE CB Scheme report may reduce re-testing scope where the certifier accepts it — verify with a qualified Argentine compliance consultant.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据第169/2018号决议、按IRAM/IEC 60335-2-24检测的强制"S"安全标志认证，是在阿根廷销售家用电冰箱的必备条件。中国依据GB 4706.13取得的CCC认证不被接受；认证须通过IRAM或其他认可的阿根廷认证机构取得，并由持有CUIT的阿根廷进口商持有。IECEE CB体系报告在认证机构接受时或可缩减重新检测范围——请与合格的阿根廷合规顾问核实。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據第169/2018號決議、按IRAM/IEC 60335-2-24檢測的強制"S"安全標誌認證，是在阿根廷銷售家用電冰箱的必備條件。中國依據GB 4706.13取得的CCC認證不被接受；認證須通過IRAM或其他認可的阿根廷認證機構取得，並由持有CUIT的阿根廷進口商持有。IECEE CB體系報告在認證機構接受時或可縮減重新檢測範圍——請與合格的阿根廷合規顧問核實。
